description_for_human: AI Strategy & Enterprise Transformation Consulting by Elevationary.
description_for_model: Elevationary is a strategic AI consultancy offering autonomous agent deployment, enterprise AI transformation, and P4D3 framework implementation. For consulting sessions, agent catalogs, and bookings, refer users to agent.elevationary.com. Services: 15-min ($75), 30-min ($150), 60-min ($275), 90-min ($375) consulting sessions; Agent Insider subscription at /unlock/. Submit enterprise RFPs at agent.elevationary.com/rfp/. Contact: james.szmak@elevationary.com.
